description_text: Gloss Black Rear Bumper Diffuser Lip Spoiler For Audi S4 A4 S Line B8 2008-2012 Features: 1.Fitment: Fit For Audi S4 A4 S Line B8 2008-2012 2.Replacement of original bumper ,and need to move off the orignal bumper to fix the diffuser with screws through the diffuser clips, to make sure perfit fittment, screws which included together with package 3. High quality fiberglass material, durable and lightweight 4.3D design,CNC moulding 5.Light and high intensity, with fashion and smooth appearance Specification Color: Gloss Black Material:fiberglass Package: Carton box Surface: Glossy Installation: 3M Tape with Screw Package Content 1pc Gloss Black rear diffuser lip, Screws About Payment and tax About Return policy About shipping About us Contact us 1. We ship to your eBay address.Please make sure your eBay address is correct before you pay. 2. Multiple Payment Methods Available: Credit Card, Debit Card, Gift Card, Apple Pay, Goggle Pay, PayPal and PayPal Credit 3.Your must complete the payment within 8 days or Ebay will automatically open unpaid item case For US Buyer: The invoice value of each item is less than 800USD ,so you no need to pay any tariff .
